items.title: Gaza health officials say 10 killed in Israeli attacks
items.summary: In a separate incident, Israeli naval forces shot dead a fisherman in the early hours of Sunday, on June 7, the Al-Aqsa Hospital in Deir el-Balah said after receiving his body.
